source: Minimum System Requirements
text: 最低系统要求

source: The following operating systems are supported for this release. RenderMan may operate outside of this requirement, but it may be unstable and is not supported:
text: 此版本支持以下操作系统。RenderMan 也许可以在不满足这些要求的环境中运行，但可能不稳定，且不属于支持范围：

source: Compatible with any Linux distribution supporting gcc 11.2 and glibc 2.34 or higher (e.g. RHEL9.x and newer)
text: 兼容任何支持 gcc 11.2 和 glibc 2.34 或更高版本的 Linux 发行版（例如 RHEL9.x 及更新版本）

source: RenderMan is designed to efficiently scale across many CPU cores, so while the above is a minimum requirement, systems with multiple processors will see the best performance.
text: RenderMan 的设计目标是在大量 CPU 核心之间高效扩展。因此，尽管以上只是最低要求，配备多个处理器的系统会获得最佳性能。

source: Pixar's RenderMan software is delivered as:
text: Pixar 的 RenderMan 软件以下列形式交付：

source: RenderMan-Installer-
text: RenderMan-Installer-

text: version

source: -linux
text: -linux

source: flavor
text: flavor

source: .rpm - The RenderMan rendering toolkit.
text: .rpm - RenderMan 渲染工具包。

source: The
text: 该

source: string includes the common distribution, e.g. RHEL9, the
text: 字符串包含常见发行版，例如 RHEL9，以及

source: gcc/icc
text: gcc/icc

source: versions, and the microprocessor instruction set. Putting them all together provides, for example, an RHEL package named RenderMan-Installer-27.0.0_2376203
text: 版本和微处理器指令集。把这些部分组合起来，例如会得到一个名为 RenderMan-Installer-27.0.0_2376203 的 RHEL 软件包

source: -linuxRHEL9_gcc11icx232.x86_64.rpm
text: -linuxRHEL9_gcc11icx232.x86_64.rpm

source: Note that users must set their environment variables manually on Linux to allow for using an executable from a terminal window. This process is explained below Command Line Installation.
text: 请注意，在 Linux 上，用户必须手动设置环境变量，才能从终端窗口使用可执行文件。此过程会在下方的命令行安装部分说明。

source: You must also meet the requirements listed on the top-level
text: 你还必须满足顶层

source: Installation and Licensing
text: 安装和授权

source: page.
text: 页面列出的要求。

source: GUI-based Installation
text: 基于 GUI 的安装

source: Although RPM packages are typically installed via the command line, some Linux distributions have GUI-based package managers, like
text: 尽管 RPM 软件包通常通过命令行安装，但某些 Linux 发行版提供基于 GUI 的软件包管理器，例如

source: gnomerpm
text: gnomerpm

source: . Some distributions will also allow for double-clicking the RPM file in a directory browser, which will invoke RPM with default arguments. You can try this with your Linux-based system. Should it not begin the installation on its own (because you do not have the necessary components to double click an .rpm) then you may begin the process using the steps below.
text: 。某些发行版还允许在目录浏览器中双击 RPM 文件，这会使用默认参数调用 RPM。你可以在自己的 Linux 系统上尝试这样做。如果安装没有自行开始（因为系统缺少双击 .rpm 所需的组件），则可以按下面的步骤开始安装过程。

source: The process below will apply to the 27.0 release, not the Beta. The 27.0 Beta does not include the GUI Installer. Instead, you can download each RPM and install it with a command like this (only the one for RenderManProServer is shown, but the other components can be installed similarly). Prefix the command with
text: 下面的流程适用于 27.0 正式版，而不适用于 Beta。27.0 Beta 不包含 GUI Installer。作为替代，你可以分别下载每个 RPM，并使用类似下面的命令安装（这里只展示 RenderManProServer 的命令，其他组件也可以用类似方式安装）。如果你的系统权限需要，请在命令前加上

source: if your system’s permissions require it:
To install RenderMan using the GUI Installer (27.0 release only), run:
text: 要使用 GUI Installer 安装 RenderMan（仅限 27.0 正式版），请运行：

source: Due to user security changes in EL9, it may be necessary to run the following command line before running the RenderMan Installer application if it fails to start under sudo:
text: 由于 EL9 中的用户安全机制发生变化，如果 RenderMan Installer 应用在 sudo 下无法启动，可能需要先运行以下命令行：

source: The RenderMan RtxSVG.so plugin requires the compat-expat1 package be installed. If you plan to use SVG textures, please install compat-expat1 first.
text: RenderMan 的 RtxSVG.so 插件要求安装 compat-expat1 软件包。如果你计划使用 SVG 纹理，请先安装 compat-expat1。

source: If you have already unpacked the .rpm, you can then run the following command to begin the GUI-based installer:
text: 如果你已经解包 .rpm，则可以运行以下命令来启动基于 GUI 的安装器：

source: The installer will connect with the RenderMan Pixar Server and download your licensed components. During the installation process you will see that the default location for installation is /opt/pixar This will become the root directory for all of the software components listed above.
text: 安装器会连接 RenderMan Pixar Server，并下载你已授权的组件。在安装过程中，你会看到默认安装位置是 /opt/pixar；它将成为上面列出的所有软件组件的根目录。

source: We'll now go step by step through the process.
text: 接下来我们将逐步说明这个过程。

source: First, you must log in with your forum account and provide the serial number for the license you have purchased.
text: 首先，你必须使用论坛账户登录，并提供已购买许可证的序列号。

source: Next, you may see the following if you are installing on a floating license server for the
text: 接下来，如果你是在浮动许可证服务器上

source: FIRST
text: 首次

source: time:
text: 安装，可能会看到以下内容：

source: This is telling you that the installer is about to key your license server to the host you are running the installer on.
text: 这表示安装器即将把你的许可证服务器绑定到当前运行安装器的主机。

source: If this is
text: 如果这台机器

source: NOT
text: 不是

source: the machine you want to run your license server on, press the
text: 你希望运行许可证服务器的机器，请按

source: Cancel
text: Cancel

source: button and re-run the installer on the machine you want to designate as the license server.
text: 按钮，并在你希望指定为许可证服务器的机器上重新运行安装器。

source: If you decide to make this machine your license server or you are installing a node-locked license, the installer will then contact Pixar and retrieve your license file. It will place this license file by default in:
text: 如果你决定将这台机器作为许可证服务器，或者你正在安装节点锁定许可证，安装器随后会联系 Pixar 并获取你的许可证文件。默认情况下，它会把许可证文件放在：

source: Windows: C:\Program Files\Pixar\pixar.license
text: Windows: C:\Program Files\Pixar\pixar.license

source: macOS:  /Applications/Pixar/pixar.license
text: macOS:  /Applications/Pixar/pixar.license

source: Linux: /opt/pixar/pixar.license
text: Linux: /opt/pixar/pixar.license

source: Next, you will see a list of packages you wish to install.
text: 接下来，你会看到希望安装的软件包列表。

source: The installer will try to find the appropriate plugins to install as well. However, if it cannot find a Maya installation or determines you have already installed the latest version of the software, it will give you a warning that something strange is afoot.
text: 安装器还会尝试查找可安装的相应插件。不过，如果它找不到 Maya 安装，或者判断你已经安装了该软件的最新版本，它会显示一条警告，提示出现了异常情况。

source: Here you can now decide which software and packages you wish to install. For instance, if you do not wish to install the Katana plugins, you can deselect those. If you
text: 现在你可以在这里决定要安装哪些软件和软件包。例如，如果你不希望安装 Katana 插件，可以取消选中它们。如果你

source: WOULD
text: 确实

source: like to install the license server for a floating license installation, you may select the "Show All" button and select the license server package as well.
text: 希望为浮动许可证安装许可证服务器，可以选择 "Show All" 按钮，并同时选择许可证服务器软件包。

source: Installing The License Server
text: 安装许可证服务器

source: talks in detail about the steps that must be taken on each platform once the installation finishes ensuring that the floating license server is functioning correctly.
text: 会详细说明安装完成后必须在各个平台上执行哪些步骤，以确保浮动许可证服务器正常工作。

source: Once the desired packages are selected, hitting the
text: 选定所需的软件包后，点击

text: 屏幕。此时，你可以退出安装器。

text: 安装器完成后，浮动许可证服务

source: Downloads
text: 下载

source: Other types of files besides RenderMan, the License Server, and the DCC plugins can be downloaded with the installer as well. These include the RenderMan Examples. These will be placed in the user who ran the RenderManInstaller Download directory.
text: 除了 RenderMan、License Server 和 DCC 插件之外，安装器也可以下载其他类型的文件。其中包括 RenderMan Examples。这些文件会放在运行 RenderManInstaller 的用户的 Download 目录中。
